full_text:
Xu Kun 徐琨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Kun (徐琨)was born in Wu. Fought under Sun Jian and Sun Ce, replaced as Administrator as he was seen as a threat. Xu Kun was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shu, and the Wu Kingdom. Xu Kun lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
